coachAM: Your journal entries reveal a relentless forward push, yet your physical and spiritual foundations are crumbling; the repeated "laziness" and "procrastination" aren't moral failings, but symptoms of a body and spirit starved for the rest and sovereignty you're neglecting, leaving you constantly playing catch-up instead of leading the charge. The root cause is a fundamental misbelief that more effort can compensate for a depleted system, which is actively sabotaging your capacity for sustained elite performance and the very discipline you crave, ultimately hindering the divine purpose you're called to embody. Today, before anything else, block out 9:30 PM on your calendar as a non-negotiable hard stop for all work and inputs, dedicating that time to your Sleep Protocol.
